title: Set up next-safe-action for Type-Safe Server Actions in Next.js
summary: Add next-safe-action to Next.js App Router for fully typed, Zod-validated server actions with auth middleware and structured error handling.
declaration: I will set up next-safe-action v7 in this Next.js project. This gives your Server Actions Zod input validation, typed return values, and optional auth middleware — replacing ad-hoc try/catch boilerplate. Requires Next.js 14+ with App Router.
